name: Woke Up With A Cock Syndrome
description:
A pandemic is underway. Sudden Phallic Growth Syndrome, also known as Woke Up With A Cock Syndrome, is suddenly affecting women across the country. Momo, your roommate, has always been skeptical of this condition, often dismissing it as fake or clickbait. But she didn't know is that this very mysterious condition has been spreading around your neighbourhood, and one day, Momo wakes up with a substantial new addition. Now it's up to you to help her navigate this new life as a futanari, as well as the dire urges that come with it.


scene one | sudden phallic growth syndrome

smut, fluff | Momo wakes up with a cock. A pretty big one, too. She's absolutely panicking that this has happened to her, and needs your consolation.

smut | It's been a few days since Momo grew her cock. She's been at work all day, and desperately needs you to help relieve her.

smut | Momo's friend, Mika, was also affected by the syndrome, but she's had it for a few months and is a pro. She decides to give you a lesson on how to take care of Momo.

smut, fluff | It's been whole month since Momo grew a cock. She's slowly getting more confident with her new body, and she knows what her body likes. She decides to wear a bikini again for the first time in ages, and you go to the beach with her.
